title: Master repo alignment audit
problem: After ticket-082, the repo is release-healthy but ~15 consecutive tickets (068-082) invested in operator/scratch-evidence/doc-cross-link infrastructure. A read-only master alignment audit is needed to determine the true build phase, whether the build is drifting from its mission (real creativity research), the current MVP definition, domain-entry gates, and the next best move before any further implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Read-only repo-wide audit report covering README, AGENTS, canonical context, operating protocol, build loop, runtime config, runbook, ticket queue, tickets 067-082, scratch modules, CLI, safety auditor, export, public site, golden tests, unit tests since 067, CI, and .gitignore.

Clear answers to: build phase, what is real/verified, what is scaffold, drift assessment, updated MVP definition, domain-entry gates, first real domain pack recommendation, next best move (option comparison), what must not happen, and a next 3-ticket sequence.
No product features implemented; no domain work seeded; no validators or tests changed.
Private scratch/probe artifact left untracked (not committed).
non_goals: Do not implement product features in this pass.
Do not seed a domain implementation ticket beyond proposed next-sequence documentation.
Do not start ticket-059/OpenAI or add cloud/API calls.
Do not commit the local live probe/scratch evidence artifact.
